reference: Hello, I am sorry to hear about your daughter. Pain on one side of the body over a long time requires a neurological evaluation. Regarding the swelling, is it painful or not? If it is a painless swelling, it needs a biopsy to rule out any tumor. I hope you got your answer. Have a good day.
text: Hello, I am sorry to hear about your daughter. Pain on one side of the body over a long time requires a neurological evaluation. Regarding the swelling, is it painful or not? If it is a painless swelling, it needs a biopsy to rule out any tumor. I hope you got your answer. Have a good day.
